---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement to the navigation blind test
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the proposed feature or improvement. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Scope

**Which navigation option(s) would this affect?**

- [ ] Option 1 (top nav + sidebar)
- [ ] Option 2 (side nav with hover-card flyouts)
- [ ] Option 3 (collapsible side nav)
- [ ] All options
- [ ] Shared infrastructure / tooling

## Proposed Solution

<!--
  Describe the solution you'd like.
  Include any relevant design, API, or implementation ideas.
-->

## Accessibility Considerations

<!--
  How does this feature affect keyboard navigation, ARIA semantics, or WCAG compliance?
  For any UI change: describe how it will be keyboard-navigable and screen-reader friendly.
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!--
  List alternative solutions or features you considered and why they were not chosen.
-->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, or other relevant information. -->
